trace_table.claim: Page heading: A regional aviation community that opens doors.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Page heading

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME is the Middle East chapter of Women in Aviation International and connects students, cadets, pilots, engineers, cabin crew, air-traffic controllers, airport and ground staff, executives, educators, and sponsors across aviation and aerospace.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Who we are

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME's hub is Dubai, members live and work across more than forty countries, and the organisation is run by volunteers led by women in the industry.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Who we are

trace_table.claim: Since 2013, WAI-ME has been building the chapter across the Middle East.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our story; Home proof points

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME has 1,300+ members across the Middle East and beyond.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our story decision 2026-06-27; Home proof points

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME reaches 40+ countries where members live and work.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Who we are; Home proof points

trace_table.claim: The 2019 conference drew 750+ attendees and was a cornerstone regional event for women in aviation.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our story and Impact

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME started in May 2013 at the Dubai Airport Show under the patronage of His Highness Sheikh Ahmed bin Saeed Al Maktoum; the first board meeting was held that October; WAI International formally recognised the chapter in November 2014; WAI-ME operates in association with The Emirates Aerosports Federation in Dubai.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our story

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME has appeared at the Dubai Airshow, Abu Dhabi Air Expo, MEBAA, Airport Show in Dubai, Global Aerospace Summit, and Kuwait Aviation Show; by 2019 the annual conference had more than 750 attendees, 26 international speakers, and a dozen sponsor companies; WAI-ME grew from founding members in 2013 to more than 1,300 members.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our story and decision 2026-06-27

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME's mission is to encourage women in the Middle East into aviation and aerospace careers and education, support successful aviation careers, be the regional home for support, and bring successful women forward as mentors and role models.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our mission

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME's vision is a region where women's contributions are celebrated, women are treated as equals, and women already inside aviation reach back to bring the next ones in.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Our vision

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME welcomes in Arabic and equips in English; Arabic is the front-door language and English is the language for aviation training, operations, safety, and member programmes.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, What we believe about Arabic and English; 02 Platform/02 Language - English-First, Arabic Front Door (Decision).md

trace_table.claim: Leadership section says WAI-ME is run by a volunteer team of women who have built aviation careers and now open the door for the next ones.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Leadership

trace_table.claim: Board roster: Ms. Mervat Sultan, President; Ms. Dina Bel Jaflah, Vice President; Captain Kristina Tervo, Board Member; Ms. Farah Al Ansari, Board Member; Eng. Suaad Al Shamsi, Board Member; Ms. Heba Hussain, Board Member, with the listed LinkedIn links.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Leadership, roster confirmed 2026-06-27

trace_table.claim: A separate Ambassadors section belongs beneath the formal board and is for active members who help run the community; launch Ambassadors are still to be chosen by Mervat.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Leadership, Ambassadors block decision 2026-06-27

trace_table.claim: At the Riyadh General Assembly in December 2025, WAI-ME and partners delivered a scholarship initiative worth more than USD 150,000, including a complete ATPL worth over USD 130,000 awarded to Rahaf Kaddoura.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Impact

trace_table.claim: The annual conference, co-located with the Airport Show in Dubai and under the patronage of His Highness Sheikh Ahmed bin Saeed Al Maktoum, grew to more than 750 attendees, 26 international speakers, and a dozen sponsors by 2019.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Impact; confirmed public 2026-06-27

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME has more than 1,300 members across more than forty countries, with most in their twenties and thirties.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Impact

trace_table.claim: WAI-ME has been present at the region's major aviation events every year since 2013, from Dubai and Abu Dhabi to Kuwait and Riyadh.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Impact

trace_table.claim: Partnerships with regional flight academies give members a route to discounted and funded training, kept plural and unnamed for now.
trace_table.vault_source: 02 Platform/02 Public Website Content - English (Draft).md, About, Impact, Partner training academies decision 2026-06-27
